headline: Is State Street (STT) Undervalued As Its Dividend Increase Meets A 7% Discount?
summary: State Street (STT) recently announced its intention to lift its common stock dividend by 10% to $0.92 per share in the third quarter of 2026, subject to Board approval, while keeping its existing share repurchase authorization in place. See our latest analysis for State Street. Alongside this planned dividend lift, State Street’s recent momentum has been strong, with a 30 day share price return of 11.25% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 69.02%, which points to building optimism around...
